audit_policy.cost_note: Audit students pay the same tuition and fees as credit students. DC residents 65+ may have tuition waived.

senior_discount.notes: DC residents aged 65+ may have tuition and fees waived, space permitting. Degree-seeking seniors pay half tuition.

steps: Complete an admissions application at www.udc.edu/cc/admissions.
Contact the Office of the Registrar at uregistrar@udc.edu to request audit enrollment.
Register for the course during the normal enrollment period.
Confirm audit status with the registrar before the add/drop deadline.
application_process.timing: Register during the normal enrollment period. Audit requests should be submitted before the add/drop deadline.

restrictions: Instructor approval may be required for audit enrollment
Audit students do not receive grades or academic credit
Space availability may limit audit enrollment
Some courses may not be available for audit
